Regulatory Authority

OSHA: 29 CFR 1910.1000 Air Contaminants; 29 CFR 1926.55 Gases Vapors Fumes Dusts and Mists

WISHA: WAC 296-155-160 Gases Vapors Fumes Dusts and Mists; WAC 296-155-145 Occupational Noise Exposure; WAC 296-62 General Occupational Health Standards
